name: Color Merge Lines
author: Poki
description: Color Merge Lines is a relaxing merge puzzler where you slide colorful dots around a grid, line up three of the same color, and watch them combine into higher levels for big combos! Plan a few moves ahead, avoid blocking yourself, and keep upgrading dots to clear the board and chase high scores. Think you can mastermind the perfect chain? How to play Color Merge Lines? Click or tap to make the choice. Who created Color Merge Lines? Color Merge Lines is created by PotatoJam. Play their other games on Poki: Domino Merge! , 1010 Color Match , Monster Duo , Numbers , King of Mahjong , Bring me Cakes , Market Sort , Onet Paradise , Onet Master , Merge Summer , and Solitaire Klondike 2.0 ! How can I play Color Merge Lines for free? You can play Color Merge Lines for free on Poki. Can I play Color Merge Lines on mobile devices and desktop? Color Merge Lines can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
